raw_consumer_statement:
In XXXX, I was the victim of fraudulent charges made on my Citibank credit card for approximately {$1000.00} ( about {$250.00} each in XXXX transactions ). The charges appeared under the name XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. 

These transactions were not authorized by me. The receipts contain a forged signature that does not match mine. I only attempted to use the card that day to purchase gas for a rental car, but the merchant claimed the card terminal was not working and asked me to pay cash. Later, I discovered the unauthorized charges. 

I immediately reported this fraud to Citibank and have been disputing the charges since then. Despite my repeated attempts to resolve it, Citibank has not removed the fraudulent debt from my account. As a result, my credit score has dropped by nearly XXXX points, severely affecting my financial standing. 

I am filing this report because this matter remains unresolved after several years, and I need official recognition of the fraud to protect my identity and restore my credit.
